channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped fridge freezer x 2 on opposite sides of Marmadon road, 21st March
item.description:
As title. Also some household waste next to one of the fridge freezers. I’m Marmadon Road between Balgowan and Bannockburn. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balgowan Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
On the cut by the traffic lights leading to Henwick school ..They have hidden a table and chair and a bird bath behind the school advertising sign.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchcomb Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 21st March
item.description:
Van appears to have been abandoned for several months and vehicle registration plates have now been removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104, Byne Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 39 victoria road, 21st March
item.description:
Fly tipping 39 victoria road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dumped household items and furniture, 21st March
item.description:
Household items dumped on the junction of Brookedene and Bannockburn Road. Not clear how long they’ve been here. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree leaning over towards house, 21st March
item.description:
High winds have cause tree to lean over towards house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roydene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 21st March
item.description:
Loads of stuff dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cronin Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disabled bay sign tipping over, 21st March
item.description:
There is a disabled bay with a sign that is leaning towards the road likely due to tree roots of the tree next to it. It’s gradually getting worse and there is a danger of the sign causing damage to a vehicle parking there. It needs to be repositioned so it remains readable to motorists and stable so it won’t continue to lean into the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eden Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At rear 96 Lucey Way Rouel Rd Est, 21st March
item.description:
Over 2days varied types (= several flytippers)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish outside 42 tallis grove, 21st March
item.description:
Unslightly build up rubbish including broken furniture, fridge and more. Sometimes spilling onto pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tallis Grove, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown tree bush at base of tree affecting parking, 21st March
item.description:
Over the past few years there has been a bush growing at the base of this tree, it’s now at the stage where it’s impossible to park a vehicle near it due to the thick branches which means we have one less parking space on an already congested road and it’s a hazard to people walking by as the branches are thick and spreading which can catch you as you walk by and cause injury. During the warmer months it grows leaves which makes the problem much worse. The bush needs to be fully removed from the tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eden Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish on Coxmount Road, 21st March
item.description:
Loads of household waste flytipped AGAIN on Coxmount Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wolfe Crescent, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: England flags on lamp posts, 21st March
item.description:
Someone visited my home today and had to ask if the street was responsible for the flags following the disgusting right wing flurry of activity in recent times. Being white it never registered but please can we remove the flags as they reflect on the inhabitants. :(

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Wellington Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement Constantly blocked, 21st March
item.description:
This walk is always blocked by an abandoned block and the container.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dripping outlet has been dripping for days, 21st March
item.description:
There is a constant drip from the white pipe thing (circled in green on the picture) causing a puddle at Edgecombe House. Has been dripping for a few days and puddle does not dry out

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress fly tipping, 21st March
item.description:
Large mattress left on the verge by the pavement / path comma by glass mill lane and queensmead wreck and bules club

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside sancho & cann house, e5 9pa, 21st March

A whole load of flytipping outside on pavement in front of Sancho House and Cann House, Southwold Rd, E5 9PA
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London

item.title: More rubbish dumped, 21st March
item.description:
This rubbish was dumped on Thursday evening.it contains plastic items,clothing and a bag of meat.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anthony Road, East Wickham, Greater London

item.title: Lots of broken glass in kids play area, 21st March
item.description:
Dangerous for children near the wooden climbing stump

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Azenby Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Manhole, 21st March
item.description:
The manhole has lost its tarmac top. It is now a trip and wheelchair puschair hazzard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kentish Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
